examples.title: Lasso Regularization
examples.description: An example of Lasso regularization in pseudocode
examples.code:
ALGORITHM Lasso
INPUT: data, target
OUTPUT: model
BEGIN
  model = initialize_model()
  FOR EACH feature in data
    model_coefficient = compute_coefficient(model, feature)
    IF model_coefficient < threshold
      model_coefficient = 0
    END IF
  END FOR
  RETURN model
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode illustrates the Lasso regularization algorithm.

examples.title: Ridge Regularization
examples.description: An example of Ridge regularization in Python
examples.code:
import numpy as np
from sklearn.linear_model import Ridge

def ridge_regularization(data, target):
  model = Ridge(alpha=0.1)
  model.fit(data, target)
  return model
examples.explanation: This Python code illustrates the Ridge regularization algorithm.
